title: UltraEffects
description: A very configurable mod that adds some effects from Ultrakill into Minecraft, such as the parry flash!
body:
# UltraEffects
A very configurable mod that adds some effects from Ultrakill into Minecraft, such as the parry flash!
**Works in multiplayer without affecting others.**
## Features
- Ultrakill Parry Effect upon deflecting a projectile and various other actions

- An Ultrakill-Like Hotbar

- Style Meter
  
- _(Disabled by Default)_ Gabriel flashing on your screen when you get below a certain percentage of health (Inspired by [Eternal Jesus](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-jesus))

## SUGGESTIONS / ISSUES
Have something to suggest or found a bug? Either [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs) or [make an issue in our GitHub](https://github.com/Now-this-is-crazy/UltraEffects/issues).
